ddls:
CREATE TABLE "household_statistics" (
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each region */,
  "total_households" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the region */,
  "one_person_household" REAL /* Percentage of one-person households */,
  "two_person_household" REAL /* Percentage of two-person households */,
  "three_person_household" REAL /* Percentage of three-person households */,
  "four_person_household" REAL /* Percentage of four-person households */,
  "five_person_household" REAL /* Percentage of five-person households */,
  "six_more_person_household" REAL /* Percentage of households with six or more persons */,
  "average_size_household" REAL /* Average size of households in the region */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the region */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of household members */,
  "average_education_level" REAL /* Average education level of household members */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_statistics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country to which the region belongs */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's centroid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the household type (e.g., One-person, Two-person) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the household type */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of household members for this type */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income for this household type */,
  "average_education_level" REAL /* Average education level for this household type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Reference to the region for which the trend is recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size for that year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of households compared to the previous year */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income for that year */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of household members for that year */,
  "average_education_level" REAL /* Average education level of household members for that year */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_trends_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_trends_region_code FOREIGN KEY ("region_code") REFERENCES regions ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Region code associated with the accessed data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Region code of the record changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the individual who made the change */,
  "change_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_region_code FOREIGN KEY ("region_code") REFERENCES household_statistics ("region_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier of the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., survey, census) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "collection_date_start" TEXT /* Start date of data collection */,
  "collection_date_end" TEXT /* End date of data collection */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the data source */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the recipient */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
